name: python3-exifread
title: python3-exifread
summary: Python library to extract Exif data from TIFF and JPEG files
description:
Python library to extract Exif data from TIFF and JPEG files
This is a Python library to extract Exif information from digital camera
image files. It contains the EXIF.py script and the exifread library.
.
This package provides the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-exifread because Python library to extract Exif data from TIFF and JPEG files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-exifread as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-exifread with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-exifread --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
